name: Superfood Smoothie
intro: A sprinkle of this powder and a dash of another powder—that’s often what my morning smoothies look like. Then I feel charged up in the best way for the rest of the day. I often make a larger batch and save some for the afternoon, so my snack is already made when I feel hungry.

ingredients.item: raw carob powder or raw cacao powder
honey or yacon syrup (or add more to taste)

method: Process all ingredients in a blender (or use an immersion blender) until you have a smooth texture.
